description: Firebase Hosting is Firebase’s web hosting service for deploying and serving static or web app content on Google’s infrastructure. It is part of the broader Firebase platform for building and operating applications.
summary: Firebase Hosting exposes a Google-authenticated REST API at firebasehosting.googleapis.com/v1beta1, plus the Firebase CLI and a Firebase MCP server that authenticate via Google Application Default Credentials; the CLI also supports a legacy FIREBASE_TOKEN CI token.
